title: CozyRosie's Bunis!
description: A goofy nuisance creature here to brighten up (and terrorize) your day!
body:
CozyRosie's Bunis bring a twinge of silliness and whimsy to your Minecraft world.

Bunis (pronounced like "Bunnies") are not quite the fuzzy forest friends you're familiar with. These guys are dubious little cosmic critters, chewing their way through stars and dimensions to find all kinds of fun things to eat and mischief to get up to. 

More of meta-cartoon than living creature, they're as adorable and charming as they are a nuisance to gameplay. One does not "fight" or "farm" the bunis, but work around and trick them into doing things that help you.

A buni's favorite things include:
- Eating picked ferns and flowers
- Eating ANY stray items left on the ground (it's okay, they don't digest it, they just store it, up to a single full stack)
- Hitting each other with hammers
- Mitosis (use an axe)
- Busting it down when they hear music
- Automation - eating a dye ingredient produces twice as much
- Being dressed up with dye colors
- Being picked up and tossed arounnd
- Not taking damage - which is great, because they never do :)

They dislike:
- Being swatted at too much
- Seeing their friends get hurt
- Placed soul torches/lanterns/fires [SCARY!!! :<]

Bunis spawn close to the world spawn, under any block open to the sky, and appear less often as you go further out. Keep an eye out for rare variants in other dimensions!

Also features a config for how aggressively likely bunis are likely to bop each other/hostile entities/players, their spawn rates, spawn cap, and a serverside whitelist tag to add entities that they attack, plus a gamerule to manually turn on/off their natural spawning.
